research.goalTemplate: Research {what}. Read README.md and any upstream source files needed to understand the current project shape. Write research.md with concise findings, constraints, and the intended implementation approach.

execute.goalTemplate: Implement {what}. Read research.md and upstream source files before editing. Create feature-builder.mjs exporting function buildFeatureName(input) that trims input, lowercases it, replaces non-alphanumeric runs with single hyphens, and removes leading or trailing hyphens.

review.goalTemplate: Review {what}. Read research.md, feature-builder.mjs, and upstream source files relevant to the implementation. Write review.md with verdict, risks, and whether acceptance should pass.
